description: A black-and-white photograph of two leaders standing side by side in a large open plaza, with the circular tiered Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests of the Temple of Heaven in Beijing in the background under an overcast sky. On the left is Donald Trump in a dark suit and tie; beside him is Chinese leader Xi Jinping, also in a dark suit; a single aide or security figure in a suit stands far in the right background. The image is a monochrome photograph with no on-image text, slogan, seal, or meme styling. The tweet caption reads 'Temple of Heaven, Beijing | May 14, 2026'.
notable_text: (no on-image text; tweet caption: 'Temple of Heaven, Beijing | May 14, 2026')
